summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Template Gallery feature. All core UI functionality working perfectly including 9 template cards, tab switching, and form integration. Backend AI generation working but with longer processing times (2-3 minutes per request).

flaky_endpoints.issue: AI generation takes 2-3 minutes per request, causing timeouts in automated testing
flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Long processing time for complex page generation (8+ sections, 40+ elements)
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Increase timeout values, generation is working correctly just slow

passed_tests: Backend AI generation processing (confirmed via logs)
Frontend prompt page loads with Templates tab active by default
Frontend template gallery displays 9 template cards in 3-column grid
Frontend template card structure: gradient preview, icon, name, description, tags, Generate action
Frontend template cards show correct content: SaaS Dark, Gradient SaaS, Minimal White, Playful Creative, Food & Restaurant, Fitness & Health, Event & Conference, E-Commerce, Education & Courses
Frontend Upload JSON button visible and accessible in Templates tab
Frontend tab switching: Templates ↔ Custom Generate works perfectly
Frontend Custom Generate form displays all required fields
Frontend form fields are functional and accept input
Frontend Page Type selector, Target Audience, Product Name, Product Description, Additional Requirements fields all working
Frontend Generate Landing Page button visible and accessible
Frontend template card hover effects and styling working correctly
Frontend responsive design: template cards display properly in grid layout
